product_mode: Ivette Personal Lab first; productized SaaS later only after personal validation
visual_anchor: locked circular chrysalis / morpho butterfly / lotus hero mark

typography.heading: Elegant high-contrast serif; use Darya font files only inside build environment, never redistribute font binaries in public package
typography.body: Readable sans serif with generous line-height
typography.ui: Inter / system sans; plain labels, obvious controls

motion.hero: cocoon opens, wings emerge, butterfly flies, logo returns and pulses with Entrar CTA
motion.app: small, calm transitions only; avoid motion that blocks task completion

copy_rules: no medical claims; coach-sourced nutrition data is stored as personal reference
